name: Writer (Palmyra)
pricing_notes: Palmyra X 32K: $0.012/1K tokens; Palmyra X 002: $0.005/1K; Enterprise custom with self-hosted option

auth.notes: Organization API key from Writer dashboard; Bearer token in Authorization header

performance.notes: Palmyra X 32K latency comparable to GPT-4; Palmyra X 002 faster; streaming reduces TTFT

agent_readiness.notes: Enterprise-focused LLM platform with Palmyra models. OpenAI-compatible API (easy migration). Tool calling support. Built-in hallucination detection (Palmyra Med for healthcare). Compliance-focused: SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR. No data training on customer data. Knowledge Graph feature for enterprise RAG. Python/TypeScript SDKs.

gotchas: Model performance excellent for business writing but not on coding benchmarks
Knowledge Graph (RAG) feature requires separate setup
best_when: Enterprise content generation with strict compliance requirements (HIPAA, SOC 2)
Healthcare and legal industries needing specialized models (Palmyra Med)
Teams wanting OpenAI API-compatible enterprise alternative with no training on data
Agents generating business documents, reports, and structured content
avoid_when: Startups needing strong OSS community and ecosystem
summary: Writer's Palmyra models are enterprise-focused LLMs with OpenAI-compatible API, strong compliance posture (SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR), and specialized models for healthcare. No training on customer data. Built-in hallucination detection and Knowledge Graph RAG feature. Best for compliance-sensitive enterprises generating business content. Coding and general reasoning benchmarks below OpenAI/Anthropic leaders.
